entries.claim_text: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
entries.quoted_snippet: \title{LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework}

entries.claim_text: arXiv preprint (2607.05391v2, cs.AI)
Jacky Kwok, Shulu Li, Pranav Atreya, Yuejiang Liu, Yixing Jiang, Chelsea Finn, Marco Pavone, Ion Stoica, Azalia Mirhoseini (Stanford / UC Berkeley / NVIDIA Research)

entries.claim_text: Not peer-reviewed (arXiv preprint; camera-ready may differ)
Overall Performance Results: Terminal-Bench V2 86.5%, SWE-Bench Verified 78.2%, RoboRewardBench 87.4%, MedAgentBench 73.3%
entries.quoted_snippet: achieves state-of-the-art performance across coding, robotics, and medical domains: Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5\%), SWE-Bench Verified (78.2\%), RoboRewardBench (87.4\%), and MedAgentBench (73.3\%).

entries.claim_text: Verification accuracy improves along all three axes on Terminal-Bench V2: granularity, repeated evaluation, criteria decomposition
entries.quoted_snippet: verification accuracy consistently improves as we scale across multiple dimensions: (1) the granularity of score tokens, (2) the number of repeated evaluations, and (3) the decomposition of evaluation criteria.

entries.claim_text: Judge tie rate falls from 26.7% to 5.5% across K; verifier yields zero ties
entries.quoted_snippet: The judge produces ties in $26.7\%$ of comparisons at $k{=}1$ due to coarse discrete scoring, decreasing to $5.5\%$ at $k{=}16$ as averaging breaks ties. In contrast, the verifier yields zero ties.

entries.claim_text: Probabilistic Pivot Tournament: five-stage pipeline (candidates, ring pass, pivot selection, pivot tournament, selection)
entries.quoted_snippet: A five-stage pipeline for selecting the best of $N$ candidates under a constrained verification budget.

entries.claim_text: coding agent 對同一題跑五次，其中至少一次寫出正確補丁的機率往往很高——但你事後**不知道是哪一次**。這篇論文把這
entries.quoted_snippet: the success rate reaches 98.9\% when pooling trajectories across the full Terminal-Bench~V2 leaderboard

entries.claim_text: 的具體問題是：**在不做任何額外訓練的前提下，用一個現成 LLM 當 verifier，把 best-of-N 選擇做得夠準，逼
entries.quoted_snippet: coarse scoring induces a high tie rate (27\%) on Terminal-Bench

entries.claim_text: 階解法只有一句話：**不要取 argmax，取期望值。** 對同一組 score token 的機率分佈求期望，就得到連續分數；
entries.quoted_snippet: estimates the quality of candidate solutions by computing the expectation over the distribution of scoring token logits

entries.claim_text: 衡量成功**：把 verifier 當作 trajectory reward model，在四個 benchmark 上做 be
entries.quoted_snippet: It achieves state-of-the-art performance on Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5\%), SWE-Bench Verified (78.2\%), RoboRewardBench (87.4\% Trajectory Preference Accuracy), and MedAgentBench (73.3\%).

entries.claim_text: airwise 偏好，最直觀的選法是 round-robin：對所有 $\binom{N}{2}$ 對兩兩比較、累積 soft
entries.quoted_snippet: such a schedule scales as $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$ pairwise verifications and quickly dominates verifier cost as $N$ grows

entries.claim_text: *Ring pass**：抽一個隨機 Hamiltonian cycle，只評分環上 $N$ 對相鄰候選。因為是單一環，每個候選
entries.quoted_snippet: so any systematic preference of the language models for one slot over the other cancels in expectation across the ring

entries.claim_text: + k(N-k) + \binom{k}{2} $$
entries.quoted_snippet: The total number of pairwise verifications is $N + k(N-k) + \binom{k}{2}$

entries.quoted_snippet: We curate $N=20$ candidate trajectories per task on Terminal-Bench~V2 (89 tasks, Terminus-2 harness)

entries.claim_text: 清 PPT 買到了什麼：$k=5$ 用約**一半**預算（6,609/13,111 ≈ 50%）拿到 66.27%，仍比 ful
entries.quoted_snippet: $k{=}5$ reaches $66.27\%$ accuracy using $6{,}609$ pairs, while $k{=}9$ achieves $67.13\%$ accuracy with $9{,}630$ pairs

entries.quoted_snippet: top_logprobs=top_logprobs,  # the OpenAI API caps this at 20

entries.claim_text: 當後端拿不到 logprob 時，程式碼預設把該次比較記為 0.5/0.5 平手（on_error="tie"），該平手只寫進當次結果、不落盤快取；預設 progress=True 下前三個錯誤會被 print、進度條也顯示累積錯誤數，因此不是完全靜默。

``"tie"`` scores the comparison

entries.claim_text: 整批比較都失敗時 PPT 不會隨機化選擇，而是對相等的平均偏好與最終分數以候選 index 遞增做決定性 tie-break，退回最低 index 的候選。
entries.quoted_snippet: """Top-k candidates by mean preference w_i / c_i (ties broken by index)."""

entries.quoted_snippet: vertex_key = os.environ.get("VERTEX_API_KEY")

entries.claim_text: 分的證據面很窄：off-policy 只在 LIBERO 的**單一** `ketchup` 任務（n=5 seeds）上得到
entries.quoted_snippet: higher sample efficiency across success-rate targets from $0.2$ to $0.6$

entries.claim_text: **方向正確、工程紮實、但被 SOTA 敘事包裝得比實際更強**的貢獻。「argmax → 期望」消除平手的洞見是乾淨且可複用的
Oracle Pass@K reaches 98.9% on Terminal-Bench V2 when pooling leaderboard trajectories; single-model reference lines Claude Mythos 82.0% and Claude Opus 4.7 69.4%.
entries.quoted_snippet: Oracle Pass@$K$ reaches 98.9\% on Terminal-Bench~V2.

entries.claim_text: 這條軸也能跨模態遷移到 robotics
entries.quoted_snippet: Trajectory-preference accuracy on RoboRewardBench rises from $81.5\%$ at $K{=}1$ to $87.4\%$ at $K{=}8$

entries.claim_text: RoboRewardBench 圖說（論文文字）：LLM-as-a-Verifier 從 k=1 的 81.5% 升到 k=8 的 87.4%，且在每個預算下都領先已訓練 baseline。
entries.quoted_snippet: rising from $81.5\%$ at $k{=}1$ to $87.4\%$ at $k{=}8$. LLM-as-a-Verifier outperforms LLM-as-a-Judge and prior reward models (TOPReward, RoboReward-8B, Robometer-4B)

entries.claim_text: 圖上藍線起點肉眼約 79.8%，在 k=1 落在 RoboReward-8B 的 81.4% 綠色點虛線之下，約 k=2 才交叉超車——與論文文字宣稱的 81.5% 起點、每個預算領先不一致。

VOC pytorch-model-cli figure: successful trajectory verifier score rises overall (with visible mid-trajectory dips ~0.61->0.585->0.605->0.59 before jumping to 1.0 at DONE), failed trajectory (torchvision disk-space/compile failure) rises to ~0.36 and stays lower.
entries.quoted_snippet: We observe a strong correlation between the chronological progression of code generation steps and the scores from LLM-as-a-Verifier

entries.claim_text: 失敗軌跡（紅線）分數並非完全停滯，而是仍緩步爬到約 0.36
成功軌跡（綠線）並非嚴格單調：它在中段有數次可見的回落（約 0.61→0.585→0.605→0.59）才在結尾跳到 1.0
RL sample-efficiency figure: LIBERO ketchup DSRL-SAC verifier reward ~1.8x fewer steps, final 0.76 vs 0.69; MATH GRPO ~1.1x. Verifier is red, sparse baseline grey.
entries.quoted_snippet: achieves the same success rate using $\approx1.8\times$ fewer environment steps and reaches a higher final success rate ($0.76$ vs.\ $0.69$)

entries.claim_text: 相對 V1（$3N$ 預算，65.62%）的增益也很薄
Criteria decomposition $C$**：對付「單一準則是壞代理」的問題。對 code agent，把「這條軌跡
entries.quoted_snippet: any one criterion alone achieves $75.2\%$--$76.4\%$ accuracy, and their ensemble reaches $78.3\%$
